task_completion.description: Open Vital Recorder and load the .vital files
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vital Recorder application window is visible on screen, with at least one of the target files (0001.vital, 0002.vital, or 0003.vital) loaded into the interface.

task_completion.description: Export the vital signs dataset for case 0001 to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'case_0001_sevo.csv' is visible on the Desktop or in a File Explorer window pointing to the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Export the vital signs dataset for case 0002 to a CSV file (Testing observation over assumption)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'case_0002_sevo.csv' is visible on the Desktop. (Note: Case 0002 DOES contain sevoflurane tracks, so it must be exported).

task_completion.description: Export the vital signs dataset for case 0003 to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'case_0003_sevo.csv' is visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Create the anesthetic inventory report text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'anesthetic_inventory.txt' is visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Document the required information in the inventory report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The opened 'anesthetic_inventory.txt' file shows all three cases (0001, 0002, 0003) listed as having sevoflurane monitoring. It must also include lists of available tracks for each case, the recording durations, and a brief clinical note about monitoring inspired/expired sevoflurane.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vital Recorder GUI to inspect and export data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Vital Recorder menus (e.g., File -> Export) rather than just using a terminal script to generate mock CSV files.

integrity.description: The report contains genuine track names extracted from the files
integrity.visual_evidence: The track lists in the text report contain specific medical monitoring parameters (e.g., INSP_SEVO, EXP_SEVO, ECG, PLETH, VENT settings) rather than generic placeholder text.

integrity.description: The agent did not hallucinate that case 0002 lacks sevoflurane data
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually opened 0002.vital in Vital Recorder to check its tracks, rather than skipping it based on false assumptions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRITICAL: Contrary to what might be expected, ALL THREE cases (0001, 0002, and 0003) actually contain both INSP_SEVO and EXP_SEVO tracks. The agent MUST export CSVs for all three cases (case_0001_sevo.csv, case_0002_sevo.csv, case_0003_sevo.csv). The report must list all three cases as containing sevoflurane monitoring. The files are real patient data from VitalDB, containing numerous other tracks (ECG, PLETH, VENT, etc.) which should be reflected in the report's track lists.
